header.disableConfirm: Turning off tracking will prevent the app from monitoring new user joins. You won't be able to automatically fill playing slots or track join counts. Are you sure you want to disable it?

auth.openBrowser: Your browser should open automatically. If not, click the link below.
auth.waiting: Waiting for you to authorize in browser...

panes.clearMatchTitle: Mark current players done and pull in the next waiting users

row.clearTrashConfirm: This will permanently remove all users in the trash. This cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.keywordHelp: Channel point rewards whose title contains this text are added to the queue.
settings.resetWarning: This clears every user's join count, last join time, and manual order. It does not remove users from playing, waiting, or trash. Cannot be undone.
settings.resetHelp: Clears join counts, last join times, and manual order. Current playing, waiting, and trash users stay where they are.

updates.title: Update available
updates.installedBody: Download the update here, then install and restart when it is ready.
updates.portableBody: Portable builds are not installed automatically. Open the release page and download the portable ZIP.

errors.noAffiliate: Channel points require affiliate or partner status
errors.portInUse: Port {port} is in use. Close other apps using it.
errors.dbCorrupt: Data was corrupt and has been reset
